name: reportDraft
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.report.statute === null || typeof output.result.report.statute.code === 'string'
_note: Flat params (RmsCadConsole ReportsTab.draft: lensRun('law-enforcement','reportDraft',{offense,narrative,location,caseNumber})). Rejects { ok:false } when offense OR narrative is blank. lookupStatute scans the offense then the narrative against STATUTE_TABLE longest-keyword-first ('grand theft' beats 'theft') → statute {code,title,class} or null; statuteFound mirrors !!statute. The ReportsTab banner reads result.statuteFound; the report row renders report.reportNumber/offense/status + the statute chip (code·title·class) EXACTLY. status starts at 'draft' and advances draft→submitted→approved|rejected via reportSubmit/reportApprove. No fake statute is ever fabricated for an unmatched offense (statute is honestly null).
